title: Welcome - Federal Data Strategy
description: Design and build fast, accessible, mobile-friendly government websites backed by user research.

summaryHistory.summary: Federal Open Data Policy and Standards Guidance, standards, and policy resources for federal data managers, Chief Data Officers, and agency leadership. About the Strategy Resources.data.gov Data.gov 2020 Plan Archive | 2021 Action Plan Download a PDF of the 2021 Federal Data Strategy Action Plan Foreword To account for the changing role of data and meet the needs of democracy, the federal government created a coordinated and integrated Federal Data Strategy (FDS). M-19-18 calls for annual government-wide Action... | Consistent with M-20-16 Federal Agency Operational Alignment to Slow the Spread of Coronavirus COVID-19, the Federal Data Strategy 2020 Action Plan is adjusting Actions by extending several Agency target dates by one month and one Shared Solution target date by three months. Milestone Measurement... | 2021 Action Plan Progress The Federal Data Strategy provides a common set of data principles and best practices. The 2021 Action Plan, released in October 2021, identifies milestones that are essential for establishing processes, building capacity, and aligning existing efforts.

2020 Action Plan Progress The Federal Data Strategy provides a common set of data principles and best practices. Supplemental Milestone Data & Examples Federal Data Strategy Action Plan, Action 2: Constitute a Diverse Governance Body (DGB) Milestone 2.1.

The Principles serve as motivational guidelines in the areas of Ethical Governance, Conscious Design, and a Learning Culture.
